generalization.notes: Renderless `CommentsProvider` accepts pre-fetched `comments: Comment[]` + mutator passthroughs — no Convex imports in the kitab surface. Generic `Comment` shape exposes `targetId` / `targetSubId` / `targetKind` (legacy `pageId` / `blockId` removed). `useThreadComments(subId)` replaces the page-/block-coupled hook names. Renderless `ThreadPopover` accepts `threadId` + viewer + `buildCreateArgs`. Nosion-specific wiring (`PageCommentsProvider`, `useBlockComments`, `BlockCommentsPopover`, Convex-backed `useStandaloneComments`) lives under `adapters/nosion.tsx` + `hooks/useComments.ts` and is excluded from kitab UP-sync. Slice index re-exports the adapter under historical names for back-compat.
